steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The blank completes to determine how much artificial sweetener [?] — this is what he was hired to find out. This phrasing is an indirect question (a question embedded within the sentence), not a direct question.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
An indirect question uses normal word order (most people prefer, not do most people prefer) and ends with a period, not a question mark.

Choices A and C end with question marks; B inverts word order.

Choice D uses normal word order and a period to close the sentence before After conducting... begins.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
